iosVersions.title: iOS 18
iosVersions.whatsNew:
Apple Intelligence integration
Customizable Control Center
RCS messaging support
Passwords app
Spatial Photo support
iosVersions.explanation: iOS 18 is the latest major release from Apple, introducing Apple Intelligence, a personal AI system that helps you communicate and work more efficiently. The update brings significant customization options including a customizable Control Center and redesigned Photos app.

iosVersions.title: iOS 17
iosVersions.whatsNew:
Interactive Widgets
Live Voicemail
StandBy Mode
Contact Posters
NameDrop feature
iosVersions.explanation: iOS 17 brought major improvements to communication and personalization. StandBy turns your iPhone into a smart display when charging, Interactive Widgets allow direct interaction without opening apps, and Contact Posters let you customize how you appear to others.

iosVersions.title: iOS 16
iosVersions.whatsNew:
Lock Screen customization
Weather app redesign
Live Activities
Messages edit & undo
Passkeys support
iosVersions.explanation: iOS 16 introduced the most customizable Lock Screen ever, allowing users to add widgets, change fonts, and customize the date and time. Live Activities lets you track real-time events directly from the Lock Screen.
